WWUS51 KCTP 112048
SVSCTP

Severe Weather Statement
National Weather Service State College PA
448 PM EDT Wed Mar 11 2026

PAC013-112057-
/O.CAN.KCTP.SV.W.0009.000000T0000Z-260311T2115Z/
Blair PA-
448 PM EDT Wed Mar 11 2026

...THE SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WARNING FOR SOUTHEASTERN BLAIR COUNTY IS
CANCELLED...

The severe thunderstorm which prompted the warning has moved out of 
the warned area. Therefore, the warning has been cancelled.

A Tornado Watch remains in effect until 800 PM EDT for central
Pennsylvania.

&&

LAT...LON 4060 7744 4046 7748 4032 7770 4027 7814
      4034 7815 4044 7811
TIME...MOT...LOC 2047Z 255DEG 42KT 4036 7804 

$$

PAC061-067-087-112115-
/O.CON.KCTP.SV.W.0009.000000T0000Z-260311T2115Z/
Huntingdon PA-Juniata PA-Mifflin PA-
448 PM EDT Wed Mar 11 2026

...A SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WARNING REMAINS IN EFFECT UNTIL 515 PM EDT
FOR CENTRAL HUNTINGDON...WEST CENTRAL JUNIATA AND SOUTHWESTERN
MIFFLIN COUNTIES...

At 447 PM EDT, a severe thunderstorm was located over Trough Creek
State Park, moving east at 50 mph.

HAZARD...60 mph wind gusts.

SOURCE...ASOS Weather Station. At 4:30 PM 60 MPH winds was reported 
         at KAOO in Altoona.

IMPACT...Expect damage to roofs, siding, and trees.

Locations impacted include...
Mount Union, Raystown Dam, Walnut, Trough Creek State Park, Blacklog,
Mapleton, McVeytown, Mill Creek, Kistler, Longfellow, Newton
Hamilton, and Atkinson Mills.

PRECAUTIONARY/PREPAREDNESS ACTIONS...

A Tornado Watch remains in effect until 800 PM EDT for central
Pennsylvania.

Stay inside a well built structure and keep away from windows.

To report severe weather contact your nearest law enforcement agency.
They will send your report to the National Weather Service office in
State College PA.

&&

LAT...LON 4060 7744 4046 7748 4032 7770 4027 7814
      4034 7815 4044 7811
TIME...MOT...LOC 2047Z 255DEG 42KT 4036 7804 

HAIL THREAT...RADAR INDICATED
MAX HAIL SIZE...<.75 IN
WIND THREAT...OBSERVED
MAX WIND GUST...60 MPH

$$

Bowen
